{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "Powershell spawned cmd.exe to execute an unusual VBScript named 'autoupdate.vbs' from the system32 directory, and made repeated connections to a private IP address (10.0.10.106:443) while also repeatedly creating registry keys.",
  "indicators": [
    "powershell abuse",
    "cmd.exe spawned by powershell",
    "VBScript execution from system32",
    "autoupdate.vbs",
    "repeated network connections",
    "registry key creation",
    "C2 communication"
  ]
}
